findings.finding: Adding a new route subject requires synchronized subject enum, owner enum, generic-route admission, shape, fill compatibility, no-fill next-hole behavior, observed route projection, expected route projection, and test assertions.
findings.resolution: Colocated the route facts in the shared generic route shape and route vocabulary mappings. The focused route adapter test exercises discovery and no-fill resolution through BattleEntrypointTrace.route_events.

rounds.summary: Reviewed copied Magic Weapon RAW, ubiquitous-language entries for Bonus Action, Spend, Spell Effect, and Holding / Wielding, the weapon-hosted driver, reducer-route vocabulary, and the copied WeaponEnhancementItemTargetRouteSubject connector. The implementation routes by generic subject, owner, fill, and empty hole shape, with no production authored-identity dispatch.

Convergence pass after evidence update: exactly doDiscoverMagicWeapon and doFillMagicWeaponTarget moved from target-blocker to pass evidence, scenario-transition rows remain blocked, and MagicWeaponTargetItem was not added to reducer-owned hole or fill vocabulary.
